data.raceComments: {"comment":"The Group 2 Arrowfield Sprint is another million-dollar race, and we like 9. TEMPTED after she gained a well-deserved first G1 win in the Surround Stakes here 6 weeks ago over 1400m. She has won 3 of her 4 starts on this course over 1200m, and with a recent trial win at Rosehill to help keep her ticking over, she can complete a hat-trick of wins. 8. MARHOONA followed up her narrow nose defeat in the G2 Challenge Stakes here with a win by the same margin in the G1 Galaxy at Rosehill 3 weeks ago. The extra 100m won't be a problem, and she is another with winning claims in this. 2. DEVIL NIGHT has found it hard to win another race, but he has not avoided any tough fields this season. He was narrowly beaten in the G1 William Reid. Include. 4. SKYHOOK ran on for fourth when resuming from a spell, and from his handy gate, he can figure in the top 3 this time.","runners":[9,8,2,4],"exclusive":true}
